events.title: Toddler Time at Hawaiian Falls Mansfield
events.description:
🌊 Toddler Time at Hawaiian Falls Mansfield 🌊

Join DFW Mom Society for an exclusive morning of splashing, playing, and connecting with other local moms and families before Hawaiian Falls opens to the public! Thank you to Arlington Pediatric Dentistry for sponsoring this event.

On July 10 from 9:00 AM–10:30 AM, children ages 7 and under will enjoy special early access to select attractions in a smaller, toddler-friendly environment. This is the perfect opportunity to let your little ones play, explore, and make new friends while you connect with other families in the community.

The following attractions will be open during Toddler Time:
• Keiki Kove Kid's Area
• Turtle Bay Activity Pool
• Niko's Splash Pad
• Wave Pool

Admission:
• $9 per child ages 7 months-7 years
• Additional siblings 6 months and younger are free
• Children ages 3 and older with a Hawaiian Falls Season Pass: $6 admission
• One complimentary adult is included with each paid child ticket. Additional adults must purchase an adult ticket.
• This event is exclusively for children ages 7 and under. Any child who is 8 years or older will not be admitted to this event.
• Tickets will not be sold at the door. You must purchase tickets from DFW Mom Society.

Important Event Information:
• You may begin lining up at 8:30 AM. Gates will open at 8:50 AM.
• If you are only bringing a child who is 6 months old or younger, you must still purchase one child ticket for admission. Only siblings 6 months and younger of paid children will be let in free.
• No children over the age of 7 will be admitted.
• Small coolers are permitted and may be brought in free of charge.
• Our exclusive event time ends at 10:30 AM. If you would like to remain in the park after 10:30 AM, you will need to purchase additional admission according to Hawaiian Falls policies.

Please note that Hawaiian Falls will open to Season Pass Holders at 10:00 AM and to the general public at 10:30 AM. Season Pass Holders will be asked to provide proof of their season pass at the entrance.

Please purchase a ticket for each child attending. There will be no refunds for this event; however, you are welcome to transfer or sell your ticket to another family if you are unable to attend.

Whether you're coming with friends or hoping to meet new mom friends, we'd love to have you join us for this special summer morning of fun!

events.title: Dallas Creatives
events.description:
This is our first little Dallas Creatives meetup, so most of us will probably be walking in without knowing anyone. This is the point.

Come grab a coffee, meet new people, make a few creative friends, and see who is out there. You do not have to call yourself a “creative” to come. If you like good people, fresh ideas, or just want to make new friends in Dallas, you are welcome too.

events.title: Swap N Shop: A Free Mom Swap
events.description:
Join us for a special morning of community, generosity, and blessing other local families. Clean out what you no longer need and swap it for items your family will actually use! We will be inside the gym at Fieldhouse USA. We will have some sensory tables out for the kids.

This is not an item-for-item swap — take whatever you need - for free.

What to bring (required to participate):
• Minimum of 5 clean, gently-used baby or children's items
• Clothing (up to kids size 6), toys, books, baby gear, etc.
• Bring as many items as you’d like!
• No stained, torn, or broken items please

How it works:
9:00-9:30 AM – Drop off your items in the designated areas + receive your shopping ticket
(Items will be self-sorted into designated areas - we recommend sorting them according to size and gender before arriving to speed up the process)

9:45 AM – Shopping begins for the first 25 moms
• Entry will be based on your ticket number which is given in order of arrival
• Groups will be let in every few minutes
• Take whatever your family can use ♡

What to expect:
• A fun and free shopping experience
• Toast and Roast will be there selling coffee
• A chance to connect and enjoy some well-deserved girl time

Important notes:
• Moms-only swap (no dads or resellers please)
• Children are welcome, we will have sensory bins for the little ones. You are welcome to visit PlayPark MTX afterward.
• Please bring your own bag — we will NOT have extras
• All leftover items will be donated to Mansfield Mission Center

Come shop, connect, and leave with items your family will love — we can’t wait to see you there ♡

events.title: (Free) Dallas-area women's 35+ meetup, Planter Painting
events.description:
Join us for a FREE relaxing and creative morning of Planter Painting with Amber, designed especially for women 35+! 🎨✨

We’ll provide everything you need to paint and decorate your own clay pot, including pots, paints, brushes, and lots of creative inspiration. Whether you love to paint or you’re picking up a brush for the first time, this experience is all about slowing down, expressing yourself, and enjoying the simple pleasure of creating something colorful and fun.

No experience necessary—just bring your curiosity and a willingness to try something new! Space is limited, so be sure to register early to save your seat. We can’t wait to spend this creative morning with you! 💫

events.title: Summer Reset w/ Dallas Matcha
events.description:
Join us for our Summer Reset! 🍵✨

We’re so excited to be back & see everyone after our month-long break!

Come recharge & reset with us as we reflect on the first half of the year and set intentions for the months ahead. Whether you’re looking to make new friends, revisit your goals, or simply enjoy a relaxing afternoon with the community, we’d love to have you there.

What to expect:

🍵 10% off drinks from Tea Top Carrollton

🧇 Fresh waffles from Cloudy Waffles

✨ Summer Reset reflections + junk journaling

🤝 Time to connect with fellow matcha lovers

Make sure you RSVP to receive 10% off your Tea Top order! We can’t wait to kick off the second half of the year with you! 💚
events.venue: Tea Top Carrollton - Matcha, Coffee & More

events.title: n8n Dallas Community Meetup
events.description:
n8n Dallas Community Meetup

DFW’s automation community is getting together—and you’re invited.

Whether you’re already building with n8n or just exploring what’s possible, join us for a relaxed afternoon of networking, knowledge sharing, and hands-on learning. Meet fellow builders, exchange ideas, and see real-world automation workflows and AI agents in action.

What to Expect

🤝 Networking with the local automation community

🎤 Quick introductions: What are you automating in DFW?

🛠️ Interactive workshop covering:
Workflow automation

AI agents

Integrations

Self-hosting

Best practices and lessons learned

🍽️ Lunch and informal discussions

Who Should Attend

Software developers, DevOps engineers, and technical builders

RevOps, Marketing Ops, and Operations professionals

Founders and small teams looking to automate without hiring a large engineering team

Anyone curious about n8n and looking for a welcoming first meetup

Schedule

12:00 PM — Doors open & networking

12:15 PM — Welcome and community introductions

12:35 PM — Workshop: Building automations with n8n, AI agents, integrations, and self-hosting

2:30 PM — Lunch & open networking

2:50 PM — Community announcements and what’s next for DFW

3:00 PM — Event concludes

Event Details

Date: Wednesday, July 22, 2026

Time: 12:00 PM – 3:00 PM CDT

Venue: 25N Coworking, 9355 John W. Elliott Dr., Suite 25, Frisco, TX 75033

Admission: Free

Registration: Required

Space is limited. If your plans change, please cancel your registration so someone on the waitlist can attend.

About the Host

Fakhar Khan is the volunteer n8n Community Ambassador for the Dallas–Fort Worth area. This meetup is a community-led educational event designed to connect builders, share knowledge, and grow the local automation ecosystem. It is not a sales event.

Questions? Feel free to contact the host through Luma.

#n8n #Automation #AIAgents #DFW #Frisco

events.title: Sensory Splash
events.description:
Come join us for a morning of summer fun at the splash pad! We’ll have sensory bins, bubbles, snacks, and more for kids to explore and enjoy. 🌞

We’ll also offer a special sensory-friendly time from 9:30–10:00 AM before the event officially begins. This quieter time is designed for families who prefer a smaller crowd, have children with sensory sensitivities, or have little ones who benefit from a calmer environment.

A special thank you to Olive Physical Therapy in Arlington for sponsoring this event! Their team will be on-site to connect with moms and share tips on pelvic floor health after childbirth.

Thank you to the City of Mansfield for partnering with us on this event as part of Project 365 this summer!

If this is your first time at one of our events, our Welcome Committee would love to help you feel at home and introduce you to other moms. Just check the box when you register, and we’ll be in touch. 💛

events.title: Books, Eggs & Coffee — July Book Club Meeting
events.description:
July book club meeting and we're making it a whole morning 🩷

This month we're reading Dear Debbie and we cannot wait to sit down with you girls and talk all about it. Come ready with your thoughts, your hot takes, and your appetite because Broken Yolk Cafe put together a special breakfast package just for us.

For $20 you get one entree plus a drink of your choice — coffee, Pepsi products, or apple juice. Just show up, order, and pay at the restaurant. No prepayment needed, no stress, just good food and great conversation with the best group of girls.

Spots are limited so make sure you RSVP to secure your seat. Bring a girl with you because book club is always better with your people 📖💚

We cannot wait to see you there 🩷

Date: Saturday, July 25th
Time: 9:30 — 11:00am
Location: Broken Yolk Cafe, McKinney TX
Price: $20 per person — pay at the restaurant
Host: The Pink Haus Club

events.title: Cafe Cursor Dallas
events.description:
Cafe Cursor Dallas — Build, Brew & Connect

First Edition

Bring your laptop, grab a coffee, and spend a few hours building with Cursor alongside other developers. This is our first Cafe Cursor in Dallas: a relaxed, builder-focused gathering where the goal is to actually get things done while being around people doing the same.

No long talks, no rigid schedule — just a short kickoff, optional quick demos, and plenty of open build time.

The Vibe

Think casual co-working with hallway-style conversations. Show up, find a spot, and work on whatever you want — your own projects, a new idea, or something you've been meaning to try in Cursor. Want to share what you're building? Great. Just want to put your headphones on and ship? Also great.

Along the way you'll pick up tips and workflows from the group, swap notes with people solving similar problems, and maybe walk away with a few new connections.

How the Day Works

🎤 Kickoff (~10 min) — a quick welcome, how the day runs, and a few Cursor tips to get the ideas flowing

⚡ Optional demos (~20–30 min) — anyone who wants to can give a short, informal show-and-tell of something they've built in Cursor. No slides needed, just share your screen. Want a slot? Let us know when you RSVP.

🛠️ Open build time — the rest of the day is yours to build, chat, and connect

The Details

☕ Coffee provided

🎟️ Limited Cursor credits for attendees — first come, first served

🧑‍💻 All skill levels welcome, whether you're deep into Cursor or just exploring it

⏱️ Come for the whole window or drop in for a couple of hours

Date: Sunday, July 26, 2026 Time: 10:00 AM – 4:00 PM

Looking forward to building together.

events.title: IT and SecOps Happy Hour Dallas
events.description:
AGENDA

5:30–6:00 PM — Arrival & Welcome Drinks
6:00–7:30 PM — Networking + Food
7:30–8:00 PM — Open Networking & Closing

ABOUT

Join a select group of IT and SecOps leaders in Dallas for an evening of industry conversation, great food, and networking, swapping stories and making real connections with fellow leaders and operators.

If you work in IT, IAM, GRC, or SecOps and are interested in how AI is transforming internal support, we’d love to have you.

Spots are limited and registration is subject to approval.

HOST

Console is an AI agent that automates employee support (IT, Security, HR, and more), designed to adapt to how your organization works. It learns from your existing knowledge base, runbooks, and app matrix to handle requests like app access, account lockouts, and troubleshooting, just like a tier-1 analyst would.

Live with companies like Databricks, Faire, Cursor, Figma, etc. Console automates 75%+ of tickets while acting as a proactive teammate, constantly identifying gaps and suggesting improvements to your processes.

Learn more here

Follow Console on Linkedin

We're hiring! Join our team

events.title: The Mermaid Experience
events.description:
🧜‍♀️ Mermaid Experience 🧜‍♀️

Join us for a magical morning with a real mermaid at Howard Moore Play Pool in Arlington! ✨

We’ve rented out the entire play pool exclusively for our group from 9:30–11:30 AM, and a mermaid (tail and all) will be waiting in the shallow end to interact with your little ones, take photos, and create a memorable experience they won’t forget.

🎟️ Limited to only 100 tickets!
Every guest 12 months and older must have a ticket - including moms. If you don’t have a ticket, you won’t be let in.

This event is designed for our littlest swimmers, so we ask that moms only bring children ages 7 and under to help keep the experience safe and enjoyable for everyone.

💦 About Howard Moore Play Pool:
This interactive shallow-water play pool is perfect for young children and features:
• Interactive water play structure
• Shallow water designed for ages 7 and under
• Pool chairs surrounding the play area
• Shade umbrellas
• Family changing room
• Small grassy areas

We’ll have snacks and drinks available for moms to enjoy. You’re also welcome to bring your own snacks, water bottles, and favorite pool toys!

Come make some sweet summer memories with us! 🧜‍♀️💙
